item:
Concept: “friend (X is a friend of Y)”
Statement: In every case of “friend (X is a friend of Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Concept: “help (X helps Y)”
Statement: In every case of “help (X helps Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Concept: “conversation”
Statement: In every case of “conversation”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Concept: “kind (gufo:Kind, sortal type)”
Statement: In every case of “kind (gufo:Kind, sortal type)”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Statement: In every case of “cause (happening X causes happening Y)” as described above, X is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a large place.

Statement: In every case of “repair (X repairs Y)” as described above, Y is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Statement: In every case of “end (happening X ends at time T)” as described above, X is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a large place.

Statement: In every case of “memory (a stored something)”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Concept: “lose (X loses Y)”
Statement: In every case of “lose (X loses Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Statement: Every celebration is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a large place.
